professor.title: 北京大学博雅特聘教授 (Boya Distinguished Professor)
professor.department: 凝聚态物理与材料物理研究所 (Institute of Condensed Matter and Material Physics)
research_areas: Path integral molecular dynamics (第一性原理路径积分分子动力学)
professor.biography: Born July 1978 in Luoyang, Henan. BSc in Physics from Wuhan University (2000), MSc from Institute of Semiconductors CAS (2003), PhD from Fritz-Haber-Institut der Max-Planck-Gesellschaft (2008). Postdoc at UCL with Angelos Michaelides (2008-2011). Joined PKU as tenure-track associate professor in Feb 2012. Promoted to Boya Distinguished Professor (长江学者特聘教授) in 2020. 2016 achievement selected as China's Top 10 Scientific Advances. Awarded PKU Teaching Excellence Award (2025).

google_scholar.verification: Email verified at pku.edu.cn on GS profile. GS profile shows 'Professor, School of Physics, Peking University' with verified email domain pku.edu.cn.

openalex.verification: ORCID 0000-0003-0316-4257 linked. Works match computationally condensed matter physics (Lee-Yang zeros, path integral methods, quantum tunneling). 203 works, 5123 citations, h-index 35.

orcid.verification: Found in ACS publication metadata, matched with email xzli@pku.edu.cn. Confirmed by OpenAlex author record linkage.

cross_validation.notes: All three IDs are consistent and point to the same scholar: Xin-Zheng Li at Peking University, School of Physics, Institute of Condensed Matter and Material Physics.
